title: Cognitive Skills Feedback Rules
rules: Do not present a global IQ score.
Return skill-band feedback such as emerging, developing, strong, or advanced practice-ready.
Show strengths and next-step exercises instead of labels.
Keep all feedback educational and non-clinical.

skill_bands.emerging: Still building this skill; shorter and simpler practice is recommended.
skill_bands.developing: Showing progress; benefit from repeated practice with feedback.
skill_bands.strong: Consistent performance; ready for harder items.
skill_bands.advanced_practice_ready: Performs well on current items; can move to more complex reasoning.
